title: Compile Proof Run 001 mission contract and claims matrix
why_needed: The public proof loop needs a bounded objective and success/failure tests before work begins.
promotion_rule: No Chronicle promotion unless replay and validation pass.

title: Convert proof debt into executable AGI Jobs
why_needed: Missing evidence must become executable work, not vague uncertainty.
acceptance_tests: Each proof debt item links to a job
Each job has ProofBundle return template

title: Prepare ProofBundle return and replay validator packet
why_needed: Returned work must contain evidence sufficient to update the Evidence Docket.
promotion_rule: Missing replay_result or validator_verdict keeps gate HOLD.

title: Model $AGIALPHA settlement thermostat without live transactions
why_needed: The economic rail should respond to proof quality without implying investment returns or live local settlement.
promotion_rule: Live settlement remains separated and human-confirmed.

title: Create external replay and falsification packet
why_needed: The proof run must be challengeable, replayable, and falsifiable.
promotion_rule: No external validation claim without reviewer evidence.
